<h3 align="center">
  Everforest for <a href="https://webmail.migadu.com">Migadu Webmail</a>
</h3>

<p align="center">
	<a href="https://github.com/stellaaash/everforest-userstyles/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3Amigadu-webmail"><img src="https://img.shields.io/github/issues/stellaaash/everforest-userstyles/migadu-webmail?colorA=2d353b&colorB=e69875&style=for-the-badge"></a>

## Usage

1. Install [Stylus](https://github.com/openstyles/stylus) for your browser.
2. Click the **stylus install** badge above (or open the `everforest.user.less` raw file) and Stylus will offer to install the style.
3. Pick your flavor and accent in the style's configuration panel.

> [!NOTE]
> Set Migadu Webmail's built-in theme to 'Migadu' for the optimal experience.
